name: Devilled Crabs
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover crabs with boiling salt water and boil for 30 minutes.
2. Drain off the water, breaking off all claws, separating the shells, and removing the spongy fingers and stomach found under the head. Pick out all the meat and set aside.
3. Clean the upper shells of the crabs thoroughly.
4. Melt the butter and add the flour, stirring until smooth. Add the cream and cook, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens.
5. Stir in the parsley, mashed egg yolks, Worcestershire sauce, seasonings, and crab meat.
6. Fill the shells with this mixture and cover with bread crumbs.
7. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes or fry in hot oil until golden brown.
